tagline: World Cup live scores, your way
heroHeadline: Every World Cup moment. One app.
heroSubheadline: Live scores, group standings, match previews, and a personalized feed for your nation — all in one beautiful iOS app.

features.title: Live Scores
features.description: Follow every match in real time with goal alerts and minute-by-minute updates. Never miss a decisive moment.
features.alt: Follow every match in real time with live score

features.title: Daily Schedule
features.description: Browse the full tournament calendar day by day. See kickoff times, venues, and what's on today.
features.alt: Browse the full tournament calendar day by day

features.title: Groups & Standings
features.description: Track group tables with points, goal difference, and qualification zones at a glance.
features.alt: Track group tables and qualification zones

features.title: Match Previews
features.description: Dive into lineups, head-to-head history, and pre-match stats before kickoff.

features.title: My Team
features.description: Pick your nation and get a personalized feed of fixtures, results, and standings.
features.alt: Pick your nation to get personalized feed of fixtures

features.title: Match Stats
features.description: Explore detailed lineup and head-to-head stats for every match in the tournament.
features.alt: Dive into lineup and head-to-head stats for every match

howItWorks.title: Download goallll
howItWorks.description: Get the app free from the App Store and open it before kickoff.

howItWorks.title: Pick your nation
howItWorks.description: Choose your team on the My Team tab for a personalized fixtures and results feed.

howItWorks.title: Follow the tournament
howItWorks.description: Track live scores, groups, and match previews throughout the World Cup.

pricing.trialText: Start with a 3-day free trial (for eligible new subscribers).
pricing.monthlyText: goallll Premium — $1.99/month after trial. Unlock full tournament access, advanced stats, and an ad-free experience.
pricing.legalText: Payment is charged to your Apple ID at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage or cancel anytime in Settings > Apple ID > Subscriptions.

privacyText: goallll may use optional, anonymized analytics to improve the app. We do not sell your data or use it for cross-app advertising.
